error_signature: WeWeb doesn’t recognize old users as authenticated
title: Old users not recognized as authenticated after role management
symptom: Old users created before adding role management do not appear as authenticated in WeWeb, even after roles are manually assigned in Supabase.
applies_when: Roles management implemented with new tables
not_this_if: New users created after adding roles are authenticated correctly
root_cause: The addition of new tables for role management may disrupt the existing authentication flow for users created prior to the changes. This can happen if the roles are not properly linked or if there are underlying triggers or functions in Supabase that interfere with the authentication process.
fix_steps: Rebuild the project in Supabase to refresh the schema and roles
Verify that the roles are correctly assigned and linked to the users in WeWeb
agent_instruction: Rebuild the Supabase project to ensure roles are properly recognized.
